zh.Elford, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾艾爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Arderne於1317年出生在英國爾阿爾德福德時，他的父親John de Arderne19歲，母親Alice de Venables18歲。他和Cecily de Bredbury至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Elford, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾艾爾福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Arderne于1317年出生在英国爾阿爾德福德时，他的父亲John de Arderne19岁，母亲Alice de Venables18岁。他和Cecily de Bredbury至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Arderne was born in 1317, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, his father, John de Arderne, was 19 and his mother, Alice de Venables, was 18. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Cecily de Bredbury. He died in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Arderne est né en 1317, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Arderne, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice de Venables, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Cecily de Bredbury. Il est décédé à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Arderne 1317 in Aldford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Arderne 19 und seine Mutter Alice de Venables 18. Er hatte mit Cecily de Bredbury mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Arderne è nato il nel 1317 nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John de Arderne, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Venables, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Cecily de Bredbury. Morì nel London, England.

ja.Chichester, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスチチェスター
ja.Elford, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォード
ja.Aldford, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Arderneが1317年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで生まれた時，父John de Arderneは19歳，母Alice de Venablesは18歳であった。彼はCecily de Bredburyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスロンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Arderne(이)가 1317년 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Arderne(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Venables(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Cecily de Bredbury(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 런던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Arderne nasceu em 1317, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Arderne, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Venables, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Cecily de Bredbury. Ele faleceu em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Arderne родился в 1317 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Arderne было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Venables, 18. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Cecily de Bredbury. Он умер в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Arderne nació en 1317, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Arderne, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice de Venables, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Cecily de Bredbury. Murió en London, Inglaterra.
